description_long: This object is a short, plump cucumber with a cylindrical shape and rounded ends. Its skin is a mottled green, featuring a mix of lighter and darker green patches, and is dotted with small, slightly raised bumps typical of cucumbers. The surface appears semi-glossy, reflecting some light, and the texture is slightly uneven due to the natural bumps and subtle ridges. One end is slightly tapered with a small, pale stem remnant, while the other end is more blunt and rounded. The cucumber's size and proportions suggest it is a pickling variety, rather than a long slicing cucumber. There are no visible cuts, stickers, or artificial markings, only natural surface features.
description: A short, plump cucumber with mottled green skin, small bumps, and rounded ends. The surface is semi-glossy and naturally textured.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length, mottled green skin, and both rounded ends with visible bumps.
description_view_1: End-on view highlighting the blunt, rounded tip and the subtle stem remnant at the center.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the cylindrical body and natural surface texture.
description_view_3: View from the other end, displaying the more rounded, blunt tip without a visible stem.
attribute_location: isolated in space with an undefined background
attribute_visible_markings: mottled green coloration with small, raised bumps
